zh.Meisgyn commote, Glamorganshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根
zh.{Blddn ap Mnrch}: 義大利馬阿斯可利 派諾
zh.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin是Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan的女兒，於大約1270年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根。她與Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Meisgyn commote, Glamorganshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根
zh-hans.{Blddn ap Mnrch}: 意大利馬阿斯可利 派諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin是Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan的女儿，于大约1270年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根。她与Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Catrin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Hopkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, now found mainly in Wales. It is derived from a medieval given name, a pet form (with the diminutive suffix -kin) of Hob, a short form of Robert that probably had its origin through English mishearing of the Norman pronunciation of R-.

en.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin was born about 1270, in Glamorgan, Wales as the daughter of Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. She married Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin est née environ 1270, à Glamorgan, Galles, fille de Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Elle a épousé Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin wurde um 1270 in Glamorgan, Wales, als Tochter von Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan geboren. Sie hat Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

ht.Meisgyn commote, Glamorganshire, Wales: Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin è nata il circa 1270 nel Glamorgan, Galles come figlia di Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Lei sposato Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.Meisgyn commote, Glamorganshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズグラモーガン
ja.Glamorgan, Wales: ウェールズグラモーガン
ja.of,Is Caeach cmt,Glamorganshire,Wales: ウェールズグラモーガン
ja.{Blddn ap Mnrch}: イタリアマルチェアスコリ ピセノ
ja.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkinは約1270年にウェールズグラモーガンでHopkin ap Hywel Fychanの娘として生まれた。Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin(은)는 대략 1270년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mg.Meisgyn commote, Glamorganshire, Wales: Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.Meisgyn commote, Glamorganshire, Wales: Teyrnas Glywysing, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Glamorgan, Gales filha de Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Ela casou-se com Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin родилась около 1270 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. Её отца звали Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Hopkin nació aproximadamente 1270, en Glamorgan, Gales como hija de Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan. Se casó con Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
